name: cursor-gateway
description: Controlled gateway for running local Cursor agents on a Windows machine.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @cursor-gateway/shared && npm run build -w @cursor-gateway/server && npm run build -w @cursor-gateway/web && npm run build -w @cursor-gateway/windows-runner
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @cursor-gateway/shared && npm run typecheck -w @cursor-gateway/server && npm run typecheck -w @cursor-gateway/web && npm run typecheck -w @cursor-gateway/windows-runner
